final:
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input d,
  input set,
  input clear,
  output reg q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (clear) begin
      q <= 0;
    end else if (set) begin
      q <= 1;
    end else begin
      q <= d;
    end
  end

endmodule
